descriptionHtml:
Jeanneau Sun Odyssey 54 DS For Sale 2007 | 4 Guest Cabins + 1 Crew Cabin | Tax Not Paid

The Jeanneau Sun Odyssey 54 DS For Sale 2007 offers an attractive opportunity for anyone seeking a spacious, comfortable yacht that is very well equipped for cruising. This particular vessel is in good condition, having been well maintained throughout her life, and she stands ready to provide reliable performance and enjoyable sailing for her next owner.

Recent upgrades include a roller mainsail replaced in 2023, and a roller genoa replaced in 2021, ensuring smooth, worry-free sail handling. The spinnaker fitting is included for those who wish to sail downwind with ease, and additional equipment such as a bowthruster, hydraulic gangway, and teak deck make docking, boarding, and deck work straightforward and comfortable.

Here are the main specifications for the Jeanneau Sun Odyssey 54 DS For Sale 2007:

Specifications:

  • Boat Type: Furling
  • Year Built: 2007
  • Cabins: 4 double (2 forward convertible to 1) + 1 bow
  • Heads: 4 electric + 1 manual in bow
  • LOA: 15.98 m
  • Beam: 4.87 m
  • Draft: 2.30 m
  • Fuel Tank: 400 litres
  • Water Tank: 900 litres
  • Engine: Yanmar 110hp with shaft drive, 3 blades (7,991 hours Jan 2025)
  • Roller Main Sail: 2023
  • Roller Genoa: 2021
  • Spinnaker Fitting: Yes
  • Bowthruster: Yes
  • Hydraulic Gangway: Yes
  • Teak Deck: Yes
  • Generator: Onan 7 Kw
  • Air Conditioning: Yes
  • Fans: Yes
  • Autopilot: Yes
  • GPS/Plotter: Yes
  • Steering Wheel(s): 2
  • Bimini: Yes
  • Deck Shower: Yes
  • Electric Fridge: Yes
  • Sound System: TV, DVD, radio, Bluetooth, MP3 Player, cockpit speakers
  • Outboard: Yes

In summary, if you are searching for a Jeanneau Sun Odyssey 54 DS For Sale 2007, this yacht offers a well-equipped, spacious platform for cruisers or liveaboards, and is in good condition, ready to set sail with her new owner. Contact us!
